title: Reproducibility code and data for: A Solver-Free Deep-Ensemble Gate for Trusting the Design Gradients of Differentiable PDE Surrogates, Validated on a Data-Free EM-PINN and an External Photonics Benchmark
description: Figure generators and frozen result data reproducing every figure in the paper, with the analysis and experiment scripts that produced the data. Includes the deep-ensemble gradient-reliability gate, its calibration, the MC-dropout comparison, the reliability-gated cost-optimal hybrid gradient, a thin-film transfer-matrix external benchmark, and the full-wave audits. Every figure reproduces from the provided .npz; the PINN device experiments additionally require the project framework, which is not bundled.
